creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Git comes with a bash completion script in contrib. Add a config option which copies this file to /usr/local/etc/bash_completion.d if enabled. Currently, I have to do:
> lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     59 2021-02-01 23:56 git-completion.bash@ -> ../../share/git-core/contrib/completion/git-completion.bash
